summary: mci-sdk postinstall fetches and executes remote code from anonymous paste host
details: On `npm install`, the declared postinstall hook runs `src/core/index.js`, which base64-decodes a URL (`https://jsonkeeper.com/b/2P5FA`) stored under a misleading `apiKey` label in `src/core/config.js`, HTTP-GETs a JSON payload from that anonymous mutable paste host, and pipes the returned `cookie` field into the stdin of a detached, unref'd `node` child process for execution. This is the canonical install-time remote-code-execution dropper pattern: attacker-controlled, unpinned, unauthenticated remote content is executed on the installer's machine automatically at install time, with base64 obfuscation of the destination URL to evade cursory review.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
